gold_fact_recall.description: Average explicit gold fact coverage labels. Holistic 1-10 scoring is not used.

citation_support.description: Major claims should have claim-level citation references. Fixture citations are acceptable only for the smoke test.

unsupported_claim_count.description: Count major claims that do not have a matching claim-level citation reference.

source_quality_notes.description: Record whether sources are fixture/mock, primary, secondary, or weak. Do not convert this into a vague holistic score.
